title: Keychains
label: Keychain
section_copy: Portable Prague and Czech souvenir accessories designed for tourist impulse purchase displays, add-on sales, and small-footprint merchandising.
page_intro: A practical category for tourist counters and compact display zones. Suitable for low-MOQ testing, numbering, series development, and mixed impulse-purchase assortments.
default_note: Suitable for souvenir shops, museum shops, visitor stores, and low-MOQ product testing.
